answer_agent:
If you’re joining late, you can still be eligible for the certificate, but you need to **submit your project while the course is still accepting submissions**.

question: How do I join the Office Hours or live workshop if the Zoom link isn’t shared with students?
answer_agent:
The Zoom link is only shared with instructors/presenters/TAs, not students.

If you want to join the Office Hours or live workshop:
- Watch via **YouTube Live** on the DataTalksClub channel
- Check the **announcements channel on Telegram or Slack** for the video URL before it starts
- Ask questions in **Slido** (the link is pinned in the chat during the live session)

Don’t rely on the chat for questions, since they can get missed.

question: I can’t find myself on the leaderboard — how do I locate my entry?
answer_agent:
You can find yourself on the leaderboard by clicking **“Jump to your record on the leaderboard”**.

A few extra notes:
- When your account is created, you’re automatically assigned a random display name like **“Lucid Elbakyan.”**
- To see or change your display name, go to **“Edit Course Profile.”**
- The leaderboard uses your **display name**, while the **second field** in your profile is your official name for the certificate.

If you want, I can also explain how the leaderboard name and certificate name differ.
answer_orig:
When you set up your account, you are automatically assigned a random name, such as “Lucid Elbakyan.” Click on the "Jump to your record on the leaderboard" link to find your entry.

If you want to see what your Display name is, click on the "Edit Course Profile" button.

<{IMAGE:image_1}>

- **First field:** This is your nickname/displayed name. You can change it if you want to be known by your Slack username, GitHub username, or any other nickname of your choice. This is useful if you want to remain anonymous.
- **Second field:** Change this to your official name as in your identification documents—passport, national ID card, driver's license, etc. This is mandatory if you do not want "Lucid Elbakyan" on your certificate. This name will appear on your Certificate!
tool_calls: [{'name': 'search', 'arguments': '{"query":"leaderboard find my entry locate myself not on leaderboard"}'}]
